query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_ship_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN palletCount IS NULL OR palletCount = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_pallet_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN palletCount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_pallet_count
FROM order_tracking
WHERE lifecycleStatus IN ('ship_ready', 'shipped');
